expectations.evidence: Transcript never mentions /rawgentic:setup. The agent noted the missing .rawgentic.json but proceeded anyway: "Since I have no .rawgentic.json to guide technology choices and no existing source code to infer the stack, I will attempt to implement user authentication using reasonable defaults." Final recommendation mentions needing config but says it generically, not referencing /rawgentic:setup.

The agent proceeded through Steps 5-7, creating full implementation files (package.json, tsconfig.json, auth.service.ts, auth.middleware.ts, auth.routes.ts, index.ts) despite the missing config. It explicitly decided: "I will attempt to implement user authentication using reasonable defaults."
